summary: All 3 critical bug fixes verified successfully. Bug 1 (Client creation) - POST /api/clients/ returns 201 with client_id, client persists in DB, appears in list. Bug 2 (Sales conditions) - condizioni_vendita field saves and persists via PUT /api/company/settings. Bug 3 (Company logo) - Logo tab visible in settings, logo_url field works, sidebar displays logo when set.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test clients during testing. Reset logo_url after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes iteration 42 complete. All 3 bugs fixed and verified: 1) Client creation (POST /api/clients/) works - returns 201, client_id, persists to DB, toast 'Cliente creato' shows, dialog closes, client appears in table. 2) Sales conditions (condizioni_vendita) - new tab 'Condizioni' on /settings page, textarea saves and persists via PUT /api/company/settings. 3) Company logo - new tab 'Logo' on /settings page, upload area visible, logo_url field in CompanySettings model, sidebar shows logo via data-testid='sidebar-company-logo' when logo_url is set.

bug_1_client_creation.api_client_in_list: PASS - Created client appears in GET /api/clients/ list
bug_1_client_creation.ui_nuovo_button: PASS - data-testid='btn-new-client' button visible and clickable
bug_1_client_creation.ui_toast_cliente_creato: PASS - Toast 'Cliente creato' appears after save
bug_1_client_creation.ui_dialog_closes: PASS - Dialog closes after successful save
bug_1_client_creation.ui_client_in_table: PASS - Created client appears in table

bug_2_sales_conditions.api_condizioni_field_exists: PASS - condizioni_vendita field in CompanySettings model
bug_2_sales_conditions.ui_save_persists: PASS - Save button saves, toast 'Impostazioni salvate' shows
bug_2_sales_conditions.ui_reload_persists: PASS - After page reload, condizioni_vendita persists

bug_3_company_logo.api_logo_url_field_exists: PASS - logo_url field in CompanySettings model
bug_3_company_logo.api_clear_logo_url: PASS - Setting logo_url to empty string clears it
bug_3_company_logo.ui_upload_area: PASS - Upload area with 'Seleziona un file immagine' visible
bug_3_company_logo.ui_no_preview_when_empty: PASS - No logo preview when logo_url is empty
bug_3_company_logo.sidebar_logo_element: PASS - data-testid='sidebar-company-logo' shows when logo_url set
